## Scope

- [ ] New CLI command (`kite_tool` or `cli`)
- [ ] New broker capability
- [ ] New strategy / alpha
- [ ] Instruments / historical / WebSocket data handling
- [ ] GTT / orders / margin calc
- [ ] Options chain / local Greeks
- [ ] Mutual funds
- [ ] Engine / OMS / risk
- [ ] Docs

## Kite-specific considerations

- [ ] Auth / daily token flow
- [ ] Rate limits
- [ ] Product type (CNC/MIS/NRML) implications
- [ ] Market hours (NSE/BSE/NFO/MCX/CDS)
